title: GTM Regulatory Outlook — EMEA — Q2 2026
summary: The European Union is executing the largest coordinated crypto compliance buildout in history—211 authorized CASPs across 23 countries face MiCA Level 2 technical standards while AMLA becomes operational with direct supervision powers in Q3. Simultaneously, the UK's FCA is closing its authorization gateway with firm Q3 deadlines, France enforces its July 1 PSAN transition cutoff, and Middle Eastern regulators in UAE, Saudi Arabia, and Israel finalize comprehensive licensing frameworks.
